---
title: "Journal Publications"
description-meta: "Journal Publications"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
css: custom.css
listing:
  - id: journal-list
    contents: journals.yml
    template: paper_card.ejs
    sort: false
    categories: true
---

<p class="text-muted" style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; margin-top:-0.5rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
</p>

:::{#journal-list}
:::

<div style="margin-top: 2.5rem; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--text-light);">
  For a complete list including older unpublished work, see the <a href="files/sue-res.pdf" target="_blank">full CV</a>.
</div>
